name: Fried Shrimp Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp by cleaning them thoroughly and removing the shell, legs, and deveining.
2. Mince the shrimp.
3. Combine all ingredients except the oil in a bowl.
4. Use a teaspoon of the mixture to shape into balls.
5. Heat the oil in a deep pot or skillet.
6. Deep fry the shrimp balls until golden brown.
7. Remove from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
8. Serve hot.
